update.changelog:
What's new in 1.3.1:
- Removed: Verification Scanner feature (deprecated)
- Removed: Platform Hunter from Email Checker page (kept in dedicated page)
- Changed: Load Email now fetches last 10 by default + Load All toggle
- Added: Microsoft sub-service breakdown (Outlook, Xbox, OneDrive, Skype, Office 365, Teams)
- Fixed: Platform Hunter scroll-intoView removed (user controls scroll)
- Cleaned: Dead code removed from check.html, style.css, events.py
